scope: bounded canonical benchmark family inherited from USD-W2

equivalence_relation.source_equivalence: bijection on source entities and events preserving admissibility, transition behavior, commitments, grounds, dependencies, revision effects, and history
equivalence_relation.target_equivalence: commitment-equivalence after canonicalization; behaviorally similar encodings with different hidden state or ontology are not merged unless the registered correspondence preserves all obligations

decision_rule.bounded_invariance_supported: all registered admissible transformations satisfy every obligation for every tested vocabulary and every negative control is rejected
decision_rule.invariance_failure: one admissible transformation changes a preservation judgment or reverses a Pareto relation without a registered cost change

nonclaims: invariance proves necessity minimality or universality
